message:
fix(web): resolve worker MIME type errors on Vercel

Workers output with .ts extension were served as video/mp2t MIME type
instead of JavaScript, causing the site to fail completely.

Changes:
- Add vercel.json with headers to serve .ts as application/javascript
- Configure Vite worker rollupOptions to output .js extension
- Fix PostProcessPipeline WebGL2 context creation with proper fallbacks
  for environments where OffscreenCanvas is available but context fails
